vocab.meaning: sự ảnh hưởng mang tính hình thành (nhân cách/tư duy)
vocab.example: My primary school had a profound formative influence on my character, teaching me the value of perseverance.

vocab.meaning: sự chăm sóc đời sống tinh thần và tình cảm của học sinh
vocab.example: I really appreciated the exceptional pastoral care; the teachers truly looked after our emotional well-being.

vocab.meaning: học vẹt, học thuộc lòng một cách máy móc
vocab.example: To be honest, I was not a fan of the heavy emphasis on rote learning that dominated our history lessons.
The wide array of extracurricular activities, from drama to chess, made school life incredibly vibrant.

vocab.meaning: sự khắt khe/nghiêm ngặt trong học thuật
vocab.example: While I found the academic rigor quite taxing at times, it certainly prepared me for the challenges of university.

vocab.meaning: một nơi trú ẩn/nơi an toàn cho...
vocab.example: For me, the school library was a sanctuary for quiet reflection amidst the chaos of the playground.
It was such a nurturing environment where every student was encouraged to pursue their individual talents.

vocab.meaning: thắp lại niềm đam mê dành cho...
vocab.example: A particularly inspiring biology teacher helped to reignite my passion for the natural sciences.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về (một nơi nào đó/tập thể)
vocab.example: The strong sense of belonging within my house group made my school years very memorable.

vocab.meaning: không khơi gợi được cảm hứng, nhàm chán
vocab.example: I found the old, dilapidated classrooms rather uninspiring, which sometimes affected my concentration.
